title: Riverstones Whisper
meta_description: Discover the power of patience & perseverance

prompts.featured: Generate a wide-angle landscape shot of a quaint village nestled between two great rivers, with a young apprentice and her mentor standing on the riverbank, surrounded by smooth riverstones, under a warm sunset with golden hues and soft, fluffy clouds.
prompts.thumbnail: Create a square thumbnail image of the young apprentice's hands holding a beautifully crafted riverstone, with the mentor's wise and aged hands guiding hers, set against a blurred background of the village and rivers.
prompts.pinterest: Design a vertical image featuring a dramatic, high-contrast visual of a riverstone with the words 'Patience and Perseverance' etched into it, set against a dark blue background with golden text overlays highlighting the story's moral lesson.
